ok it is not in the env target (and not merged) but a trigger is already set in ci-management, which works well..it detects a change in a robot file, it is trying to launch the associated linter.

As for the moment there are too many Errors according to the linter, I will remove the trigger from ci-management.
it still could be launched locally once https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/testsuite/+/103291 is merged but it will nto be triggered
